pg65-p1: (including sex) were hurt or threatened. So we were sore. We were "burned up."
pg65-p2-s1: On our grudge list we set opposite each name our injuries.
pg65-p2-s2:
Was it our self-esteem, our security, our ambitions, our
personal, or sex relations, which had been interfered with?
